title: Lotodes melanocarpum
taxonomy: Lotodes melanocarpum is a species of flowering plant in the family Haloragaceae. It belongs to the genus Lotodes and is a type of haloragid. The plant is native to Australia, where it grows in wetland environments. Its classification places it within the larger clade of flowering plants, specifically within the eudicots. Lotodes melanocarpum is further classified within the subclass Rosidae and the order Haloragales.
